bank.retain_mission: Extract customer-service playbooks across general, hospitality, and retail-returns contexts.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about channels, SLAs, escalation paths, and recurring customer-issue categories. Ignore one-off ticket text.

mental_models.name: Service Channels
mental_models.source_query: What channels and SLAs are in force? Include escalation paths and ownership.

mental_models.name: Issue Themes
mental_models.source_query: What issue categories recur across CS contexts, and which response patterns work?
